Notice Of Motion And Motion Consent Judgment

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Erika McCarthy's motion for entry of consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
